dj_text: LET'S GOOO! We Found Love [Bardcore / Medieval Style Instrumental Cover] WAS FIRE AND Travelers Who Rest - Medieval Style [BardCore] JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - Stardust Crusaders OST IS EVEN HOTTER! And then there was one. Last track after this.

recovery_text: Frequency stabilized. For now. The walls between kosmos are thin today.
